english_text: Seollal is Korean Lunar New Year
Seollal falls on the 1st of the lunar calendar
Eating tteokguk means you age one year
korean_text: 떡국을 먹으면 한 살 더 먹어
romanization: tteokgugeul meogeumyeon han sal deo meogeo

english_text: Tteokguk is sliced rice cake soup
Sebae is a deep bow of respect
Yutnori is a traditional board game
Kite flying is a Seollal tradition
Japchae is always on the table
Manduguk is popular in northern Korea
We set up the charye table
Ancestral rites are performed in the morning
We bow to our ancestors first
What is your New Year's resolution?
I will exercise more this year
The new year brings new hope
We wish each other good fortune
May you have a prosperous year
Luck and health to your family
The train tickets sell out fast
I booked tickets months in advance
I bought hanbok for my child
We watch Seollal specials on TV
The first full moon is celebrated
We eat ogobaap on the first full moon
May this new year be your best
I hope all your wishes come true
Let us make great memories this year
Wishing you twelve months of happiness
